ops.text: v10 CUTOVER COMPLETE (2026-07-12, supersedes 'pending rerun' in the run synthesis): cc-transcript mining.sampling + watch landed upstream (a8cdf46, 467017b), released as 12.1.0 (PyPI, trusted publishing green); cc-steer constraint bumped >=12.1,<13 (2b51cfd). cc-steer main CI fully GREEN (pytest collection + wheel smoke + Linux ty). Local note: ~/Code/cc-transcript working copy still carries the remaining un-landed WIP (facts/tools/judge/store/render edits) on a stale detached HEAD — rebase onto main at leisure; the landed files will no-op out.
